reviews.comment:
Estoy totalmente decepcionado con el trato de la sucursal del ACA Av Cabido.
Tengo mas de 20 años de socio y ultimamente he visto un total destrato del personal de las oficinas hacia los socios.
Ademas consulte hace unos dias sobre un service de Cambio de aceite y filtros y me tomaron el turno para dos dias mas adelante para darles tiempo a conseguir los filtros de mi auto importado, supuestamente no consiguieron pero no me avisaron absolutamente nada. Mi Sra falto al trabajo para llevar el auto a la hora del turno y la atendieron con impresentable desden de parte del encargado de mecanica y del impresentable mecanico de YPF.
Realmente lamentable todo.
Mi reflexion para los empleados si no les gusta o estan desconformes con el trabajo que hacen busquen otro, pero no se lo desquiten con los socios, ya que gracias a ellos cobran su sueldo.
Saludos

(Translated by Google)
I am totally disappointed with the treatment at the ACA Av Cabido branch.
I have been a member for over 20 years, and lately I have seen complete disrespect from the office staff toward the members.
I also inquired a few days ago about an oil and filter change, and they scheduled my appointment for two days later to give them time to get the filters for my imported car. Supposedly, they didn't get any, but they didn't inform me at all. My wife missed work to bring the car in at her appointment time and was treated with appalling disdain by the mechanics manager and the disreputable YPF mechanic.
It's all truly deplorable.
My thoughts are with the employees: if you don't like or are dissatisfied with the work you do, find another job, but don't take it out on the members, since it's thanks to them that you get paid.
Regards
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxc3VHeUFREAE
